calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Off Calendar

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for Jeff Wilkins (Petitioner).

Ms. Steneberg stated that PACT will serve as Successor Trustee, that the Family members will pay the Trustee's fees and that they had full discussion and disclosure as the costs of the Trustee's fees. The Court granted the Petition for Substituted Judgment Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
